summary: Tested Phase 2/3/4 backend APIs and frontend pages for Capital Care AI. 24/24 backend pytest cases passed covering investments, real-estate, net-worth, zero-budget, lend-borrow, debt-payoff (avalanche/snowball/both), jars (deposit/withdraw), sip-rd, fds, deductions (80C), tax-calendar, itr-summary, form26as upload, unusual-alerts, plus Phase-1 regression on budgets/loans/credit-cards/health-score/daily-limit/weekly-digest/subscriptions/autosave. Frontend login works; all 9 new pages (/investments, /real-estate, /net-worth, /zero-budget, /lend-borrow, /debt-payoff, /jars, /sip-rd, /tax) render with proper headings and buttons; dashboard shows all 12 Quick Access tiles (quick-budgets, quick-zero-budget, quick-loans-&-emi, quick-credit-cards, quick-debt-payoff, quick-investments, quick-real-estate, quick-net-worth, quick-sip--rd--fd, quick-savings-jars, quick-lend-&-borrow, quick-tax-&-80c). Cashly design (cream bg, coral accent, white cards, pill buttons) intact.

minor.issue: Returns empty buckets dict when user has no FY transactions. Review spec mentioned buckets should always include salary/business/capital_gains/other_sources/house_property/not_taxable with amount=0, count=0 for empty state. Currently structure is correct but keys are not pre-populated with zeros.
Returns `sections` as a nested dict keyed by section code (80C, 80D...). Review spec listed fields as limit/remaining/utilization_pct/estimated_tax_saved which are all present and correct — OK.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — likely icon/span inside <option> element inside a native <select>. Causes console warning, not functional break.

action_items: (Optional) Pre-populate ITR summary buckets with zero entries for all known categories (salary, business, capital_gains, other_sources, house_property, not_taxable) even when no transactions exist, to match review spec.
(Optional) Fix /sip-rd page hydration warning: remove <span> inside <option> (use plain text content in <option> or switch to a custom shadcn Select).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1621 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, individual, shop, ca, investments, tax) for maintainability.
Net-worth endpoint re-runs loan amortization in a Python loop per loan on every call — can be cached or factored into a shared util with /api/loans.
Debt payoff simulator capped at 600 months but does not warn caller if simulation hits cap — may silently return incomplete payoff_order for poorly-structured debts.
/api/payments/status/{session_id} has hardcoded host_url='https://example.com' for webhook_url construction — works because webhook_url is unused for status-check, but misleading; recommend removing.

Multiple endpoints (jars, sip-rd, fds, deductions, investments) trust client-supplied `current_price`, `amount`, `interest_rate` etc. without bounds/sanity validation — a negative amount on deposit/withdraw is currently accepted.
test_credentials: admin@capitalcare.ai / Admin@123 (working; persisted session via httpOnly cookies)
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_-prefixed records created and deleted within each test class (investments, real-estate, lend-borrow, jars, sip-rd, fds, deductions). Zero-budget for 2026-02 persisted as test side-effect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2/3/4 backend 100% green via /app/backend/tests/test_phase234_features.py. Frontend pages load and render; did not exhaustively click-through every form (add investment, deposit to jar, run debt simulator in UI) — spot-check only. If regression needed, run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase234_features.py -v`. SIP payload uses plan_type (SIP/RD), FD uses principal (not amount), Deduction uses financial_year (not fy).
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Two optional polish items: (1) ITR summary returns only buckets for categories that have data — cosmetic; frontend should handle empty buckets. (2) /sip-rd hydration warning from <span> inside <option>.
